story.text:
# 📖 ⿻ Act III: View from Yushan
**act** · mage · narrative · plurality

A View from Yushan. Taiwan transformed collision into elevation.
> *Where tectonic plates collide, mountains rise. Taiwan transformed collision—between authoritarian and libertarian pressure—into elevation. The third way exists because they chose it.*
